summary: High‑energy performance (notably a killer Jack Straw) hampered by poor recording quality.
review: The show is remembered as a hot, high‑energy set with Jerry’s guitar work on “Jack Straw” getting special praise. Unfortunately the available tape sounds muddy and fails to capture that excitement, prompting reviewers to recommend seeking a better soundboard or audience source.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviews focus on the recording’s deficiencies while only modestly praising the performance; consistent low star ratings (1‑2) lead to a clear negative overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers say the sound quality does not do the show justice, describing it as sub‑par and recommending other recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as hot and high‑energy; no detailed criticism of song order beyond the general performance vibe.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His playing on ‘Jack Straw’ is highlighted as shiveringly good.
